all_facts.fact: Queen Sarah P-fly rules as the unchallenged sovereign of the Sacred Chain, the pulsating heart of Block Topia, where her decrees shape the destiny of The GKniftyHEADS and the broader Crypto Moonboys universe, anchoring decentralized power.

As the host of the Hard Fork Games, she presides over fierce blockchain battles in Block Topia, determining the elite HODL X Warriors, an event that stands as a crucible for rebellion and a defining ritual of strength in the metaverse.

Her influence extends beyond mere governance, embodying the spirit of street-art rebellion inspired by Sarah PU51FLY, merging real-world passion with digital authority to inspire warriors against centralized forces in every corner of Block Topia.
